title: Eupodium laeve

Eupodium laeve is considered a rare and endangered species due to its limited distribution and habitat.

The bioactive constituents of Eupatorium laeve include flavonoids, sesquiterpene lactones, and other phenolic compounds, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
